# Data Source: okta_idps

Get a list of identity providers from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_idps/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `q` (String) Searches the name property of identity providers for matching value.
- `type` (String) Filters by identity provider type (OIDC, SAML2, APPLE, FACEBOOK, GOOGLE, LINKEDIN, MICROSOFT).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `idps` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--idps))

<a id="nestedatt--idps"></a>
### Nested Schema for `idps`

Read-Only:

- `id` (String)
- `issuer_mode` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `protocol_type` (String)
- `status` (String)
- `type` (String)
